3312710.name: ALVR - Air Light VR
3312710.description:
Play your favorite SteamVR games on your wireless VR headset.

This program requires an app to be installed on the headset. Download the ALVR client from the Meta Store.

A Steam release for the Linux version of ALVR is planned.

ALVR is opensource and community maintained. If you need help or you want to help with development you can join our Discord server (link on the right).
